issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://mail.yahoo.com/d/folders/1?reason=invalid_cred](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmail.yahoo.com%2Fd%2Ffolders%2F1%3Freason%3Dinvalid_cred) ### Comment > For ages it never did this but out of nowhere I get ads shown at the top of my inbox on yahoo mail. The ads on the right side & bottom seem to stay black but htere is alwasy one right above the first email in my inBox ### Screenshots

comment.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://mail.yahoo.com/c/d/folders/406?reason=cloud](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmail.yahoo.com%2Fc%2Fd%2Ffolders%2F406%3Freason%3Dcloud) ### Comment > This started today. the bottom of yahoo mail takes up real estate like its trying to serve up an ad. Can you look into this? thank you. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/td4yt1hszlwg88cgc84wks4w40csk88o7p8mhl399c.png?nc=1)
